'''chafata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dna|dna]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-f-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dna|dna]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| chafata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæfætæth|chæfætæth]] || [[word:chæfætæj|chæfætæj]] || [[word:chæfætæsh|chæfætæsh]] || [[word:chæfætæ|chæfætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:chafafatath|chafafatath]] || [[word:chafafataj|chafafataj]] || [[word:chafafatash|chafafatash]] || [[word:chafafata|chafafata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:chafatath|chafatath]] || [[word:chafataj|chafataj]] || [[word:chafatash|chafatash]] || [[word:chafata|chafata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:chafaftafth|chafaftafth]] || [[word:chafaftafj|chafaftafj]] || [[word:chafaftafsh|chafaftafsh]] || [[word:chafaftaf|chafaftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chafatatha|chafatatha]] || [[word:chafataja|chafataja]] || [[word:chafatasha|chafatasha]] || [[word:chafataka|chafataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chafatath|chafatath]] || [[word:chafataj|chafataj]] || [[word:chafatash|chafatash]] || [[word:chafata|chafata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chafatathal|chafatathal]] || [[word:chafatajal|chafatajal]] || [[word:chafatashal|chafatashal]] || [[word:chafatakal|chafatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chafataathatha|chafataathatha]] || [[word:chafataajaja|chafataajaja]] || [[word:chafataashasha|chafataashasha]] || [[word:chafataaka|chafataaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chafatathan|chafatathan]] || [[word:chafatajan|chafatajan]] || [[word:chafatashan|chafatashan]] || [[word:chafatakan|chafatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chafatathaoro|chafatathaoro]] || [[word:chafatajaoro|chafatajaoro]] || [[word:chafatashaoro|chafatashaoro]] || [[word:chafatakaoro|chafatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1a7b009}}
